backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining an Inquiry type and two methods: submitInquiry (validates and stores inquiries) and getInquiries (returns all stored inquiries as an array).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping completed feature IDs (location/phone/name/SEO updates) to the specific frontend files they affect, along with test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a human-readable index of each file's purpose and key content.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind layers and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags (title, description, keywords, og:title, og:description) referencing Kalaiya 10, Bara, Nepal and phone 9824284662, plus Google Fonts preloads for Nunito and Poppins.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with a shared Layout (Navigation, Footer, FloatingActionBar) and defines six routes for Home, About, Services, Products, HealthTips, and Contact pages.
frontend/src/components/FloatingActionBa: Persistent UI component rendering a full-width Call Now / WhatsApp bar on mobile and floating circular buttons on desktop, both linked to phone 9824284662 and WhatsApp 9779824284662.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying pharmacy branding, quick navigation links, and contact info (address 'Kalaiya 10, Bara, Nepal', phone 9824284662, WhatsApp link) with copyright year and attribution.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive sticky navigation header for Arogya Pharmacy with desktop nav links, a phone CTA button, and a collapsible mobile menu using TanStack Router for active-link detection.
Displays a grid of pharmacy service cards (medicine sales, delivery, health advice, etc.) with an optional compact mode that shows only the first three services.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider component, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for submitting a customer inquiry mutation and fetching all inquiries from the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for the pharmacy's color theme (green and saffron), dark mode variants, and utility classes for gradients and tap targets.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page for Arogya Pharmacy featuring a hero section, the pharmacy's origin story, a grid of trust/credential points, and a team member profile card.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page for Arogya Pharmacy with a form to submit medicine inquiries (name, phone, address, message) using the useSubmitInquiry hook, plus displayed phone/WhatsApp contact info.
frontend/src/pages/HealthTips.tsx: Health tips page displaying a static list of expandable health articles (monsoon, nutrition, first aid) with accordion-style full content reveal.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Homepage for Arogya Pharmacy featuring a hero section with CTA buttons, stats, testimonials, and embedded ServicesSection component.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: Products page displaying searchable medicine category cards (painkillers, vitamins, children's, cold/flu, first aid) with WhatsApp order links.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page with a hero section, the reusable ServicesSection component, and a CTA card with call/WhatsApp contact buttons.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom pharmacy brand colors (green, saffron), fonts (Poppins, Nunito), border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state and architecture for Arogya Pharmacy's mobile-first website, including feature list, real pharmacy details (Kalaiya 10, Bara, Nepal), and design/SEO requirements.
